steps.title: Admin invoices list
steps.note: Sidebar → Invoices: every invoice, newest first (the purchase just made is at the top).

steps.title: Invoice detail
steps.note: The invoice detail: line items, amounts, and the Subscription info block.

steps.title: Subscription detail
steps.note: Open the subscription created by the purchase — status, billing period, payment history.

steps.title: Inside the package
steps.note: Open the package (the GHRM plan) — its configuration / pricing.
